channel.title: 10kiq Research — AI Financial Analysis
channel.description: Research and insights on AI-powered financial analysis, SEC filing interpretation, RAG architectures, vLLM optimization, and production LLM systems from the 10kiq team.

item.title: vLLM Request Lifecycle & Optimization
item.dc:creator: Harpreet Ahluwalia
item.description: An interactive deep dive into vLLM's 11-step request lifecycle — how PagedAttention, Continuous Batching, and Prefix Caching deliver 24x throughput improvements over naive inference.

item.title: Per-Stage Token Telemetry Reveals Hidden Consumption Patterns
item.dc:creator: Harpreet Ahluwalia
item.description: Per-stage token instrumentation revealed follow-up context consumed the most tokens. Granular telemetry enables targeted optimization — reduced multi-turn token consumption by ~40%.

item.title: LLM Benchmarking: Why Our 8B Model Beat the 72B
item.dc:creator: Harpreet Ahluwalia
item.description: We tested 6 model configurations across 10 deterministic financial queries. The data surprised us: llama3.1:8b was 23x faster AND 30% more accurate than qwen2.5:72b.

item.title: Structured Outputs Eliminate Malformed JSON Errors
item.dc:creator: Harpreet Ahluwalia
item.description: Use Pydantic schemas with Ollama structured outputs to guarantee valid JSON — reduced errors from 5-10% to ~0%. API-level constraints beat prompt instructions every time.

item.title: Playwright for End-to-End UI Validation
item.dc:creator: Harpreet Ahluwalia
item.description: Found a props mismatch bug in 2 minutes with Playwright — backend sent props.summary but frontend expected props.text. Fixed with 1-line change.

item.title: Token-based Trimming Beats Message-Count Sliding Window
item.dc:creator: Harpreet Ahluwalia
item.description: Token-based trimming guarantees no context overflow and provides 3.75x observed speedup by reducing from 25K to 6K tokens. Use 75% of context limit, not 100%.

item.title: Silent Embedding Failures Cause 0% Confidence and Wrong Answers
item.dc:creator: Harpreet Ahluwalia
item.description: Missing embedding model after Docker migration caused silent failures with 0% confidence. Two-model architecture: LLM generates text, embedding model enables search.

item.title: Infrastructure Bottleneck Masquerading as Algorithm Problem
item.dc:creator: Harpreet Ahluwalia
item.description: Docker on Mac = CPU-only (no GPU). Native Mac = 5-10x faster via Metal. Verify infrastructure before optimizing algorithms.

item.title: Multi-Agent Token Multiplication: 15x More Tokens Than Chat
item.dc:creator: Harpreet Ahluwalia
item.description: System prompts are 71x larger than user queries. 3-agent pipeline uses 15x more tokens than chat, but improves accuracy. Intentional trade-off.

item.title: Structured Data → Deterministic UI Rendering
item.dc:creator: Harpreet Ahluwalia
item.description: LLMs extract data, code handles presentation. Structured JSON → formatter functions → UI components. Consistent rendering, no wasted tokens.

item.title: Data Structure > Complex Architecture
item.dc:creator: Harpreet Ahluwalia
item.description: Changed list to dict — fixed 5-week problem in 2 days with 95% less code. Data structure changes often beat architectural complexity.

item.title: Natural Text In → Structured Data Out
item.dc:creator: Harpreet Ahluwalia
item.description: Feed LLMs natural text (how they were trained), require structured JSON output (for parsing). Saves 20-30% tokens.

item.title: Bigger Models ≠ Better Performance
item.dc:creator: Harpreet Ahluwalia
item.description: llama3.1:8b beat Qwen72b on both speed (23x faster) and accuracy (30% better). Task-fit matters more than parameter count.

item.title: Homogeneous Models Beat Specialized Mixes
item.dc:creator: Harpreet Ahluwalia
item.description: Specialized model mix (34.2% accuracy) performed 2x worse than homogeneous llama3.1:8b (72.5%). Keep it simple.

item.title: Examples Reduce Hallucination by 60%
item.dc:creator: Harpreet Ahluwalia
item.description: Concrete examples in prompts reduced malformed queries by 60%. Show, don't tell — LLMs learn patterns from examples.

item.title: Top-k Matters for Recall
item.dc:creator: Harpreet Ahluwalia
item.description: Top-5 → Top-10 retrieval improved answer completeness by 35%. Start with 10 chunks, tune based on context window.

item.title: Standardize LLM APIs
item.dc:creator: Harpreet Ahluwalia
item.description: Standardized all LLM calls to ChatOllama via factory function. Enabled consistent streaming and simpler maintenance.

item.title: Executive Queries Need Context
item.dc:creator: Harpreet Ahluwalia
item.description: Adding 'executive officers' keyword improved CFO query accuracy from 60% → 95%. Context disambiguates semantic search.

item.title: Checkpointing Enables Memory
item.dc:creator: Harpreet Ahluwalia
item.description: PostgreSQL-backed checkpointing enables multi-turn conversations. Each turn persists to DB, loaded on next query.
